name: Havelock Scuba Diving Sites
description: Internationally acclaimed PADI-certified dive sites including 'The Wall', 'Dixon's Pinnacle', and 'Johnny's Gorge' with abundant marine life including manta rays, sea turtles, and reef sharks.
history: Scuba diving was introduced here in the 1990s; today Havelock is South Asia's top recreational diving destination.
famousFor: World-class scuba diving, manta rays, barracuda schools.
